name: Maritana Minerals Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 48% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.8150, stop A$0.5940, target A$0.9450 (0.59:1) — then trail it.
